title: Would it be great to have best used case by industry by category

posts.author: Ibrahim (Ibrahim)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

Would it be great to have best used case by industry by category ?

for example I am sure that many marketing agencies are applying in Monday.com, it would be very helpful to get a real-case workflow and structure for the newcomers.

I have beeing using Monday.com for over a year and half now, and I am sure that I did not get to the best result when it comes to the best case to utilize Monday.com

what about that ?

posts.author: ElenaK (Elena Korolkova (Kick Consulting))
posts.cookedHtml:
Welcome to the community @Ibrahim

My name is Elena and I’m the founder of one of Australian monday.com partners, Kick Consulting. We have a workflow build for marketing agencies and are actually running a webinar on a ‘Marketing Performance Solution’ powered by monday.com + Supermetrics on 24th August at 12pm. Register here.

Would your team like to join? I also can walk you through the set up 1 on 1.

Elena
